text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking along the street back to
my place...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: GYAAAHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Dang it... Messed up again...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, when'd you get here, minion?! Your timin's
perfect! Help me with my gate trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I assume that scream just now was the sound of
her struggling with training, so I decide to help
her out. However...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
When I get into the gate, you give me the signal
to start. Got it?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: All riiiiight... I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Gimme the signal! The signal, dang it! Come on,
c'mon, c'mon!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: GWEH?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprised by her yelp, I rush over to find... Shinko
Windy's foot stuck in a deep hole at the starting
line. She's sprawled dramatically across the
ground.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Grrrr... DANG IT! Why do I keep fallin'?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
And after all that fidgetin' I did to build up
power! GAH!
choice_data_list: I think the fidgeting might be the problem...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
That's not true! The fidgetin' is proof I'm gettin'
fired up to run like the wind! Plus it helps with
gettin' off to a good start!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
That puts all eyes on me! And that's when I chomp
down hard on first place! That's the perfect race,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it's true that a competitive spirit is vital for
racing, her fidgeting feet are what dug the hole
that tripped her up and bungled her all-important
start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I need to persuade her to look at it in a
different light.
choice_data_list: I think you could do better.
I think you could do better.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Whatcha tryin' to say?!
choice_data_list:
If you save all that fire for after the gates open,
people are gonna go wild.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that people get caught off guard by
unpredictable surprises, and that she'd look
cooler if she kept her competitiveness under
wraps until the race was underway.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Competitive spirit... lookin' cool...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Huh? She's awfully quiet. Maybe she's nervous.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the gates are open! Who will make the first
move?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAHHHHH! COMPETITIVE SPIRIIIIIT!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
What's with that fighting spirit?! Wasn't she
totally silent a second ago?! She's so cool! Wow!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Guess I'll have to give it a shot, if ya
insist!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm in the gate. Gotta suppress the
fidgets... Stay cooool!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: GRAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: I did it! I didn't trip up! Hey, hey! How was I?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Mehehe! I like this trainin'! Imma do it like a
hundred times!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! So you're gonna get to witness me being
cool a hundred more times! Aren't you lucky!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Unable to say no to her beaming smile, I stay
with her until she wears herself out.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: GAHHHHH?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Ack... Awww...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: I'm... fine, but... I think... Imma call it... a day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She runs off in tears from the sheer pain.
